title: Parliament Aftermath
important_facts_added: UK Parliament openly debates Harry Potter’s power.
ICW emergency delegation summoned to London, demanding Potter’s surrender.
Ministry crisis meeting exposes fractures: Percy Weasley pushing for containment.
Hermione publicly defends Harry in front of journalists at Westminster.
notes_for_bible: Add ICW emergency session and Hermione’s press confrontation to the timeline. Add Percy Weasley and UK Parliament faction if not already present.
